replicaCount.title: Number of replicas
replicaCount.description: Number of Ollama replicas to deploy

strategy.title: Deployment strategy
strategy.description: Deployment update strategy. When persistence is enabled with ReadWriteOnce, default is Recreate to ensure only one pod mounts the PVC at a time.

type.title: Strategy type
type.description: Deployment strategy type. Empty string uses default (Recreate when persistence enabled, RollingUpdate otherwise)

rollingUpdate.title: Rolling update configuration
rollingUpdate.description: Configuration for RollingUpdate strategy (only used when type is RollingUpdate)

maxSurge.title: Max surge
maxSurge.description: Maximum number of pods that can be created over the desired number

maxUnavailable.title: Max unavailable
maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of pods that can be unavailable during update

podLabels.title: Pod labels
podLabels.description: Map of labels to add to the pods

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle hooks
lifecycle.description: Lifecycle hooks for pod assignment (override ollama.models startup pull/run). Can be used to customize startup/shutdown behavior.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.title: Termination grace period
terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Wait for a grace period before terminating pods (seconds). Useful for graceful shutdown of long-running inference requests.

hostIPC.title: Host IPC
hostIPC.description: Use the host's IPC namespace (default: false for security). Only enable if required for specific use cases.

hostPID.title: Host PID
hostPID.description: Use the host's PID namespace (default: false for security). Only enable if required for specific use cases.

hostNetwork.title: Host network
hostNetwork.description: Use the host's network namespace (default: false for security). Controlled by podSecurityStandards.disallowHostNetwork, but can be explicitly overridden here.

nodePort.title: NodePort
nodePort.description: NodePort number (30000-32767). Only used when type is NodePort. If not specified, Kubernetes assigns a random port.

loadBalancerIP.title: LoadBalancer IP
loadBalancerIP.description: LoadBalancer IP address. Only used when type is LoadBalancer.

ipFamilies.title: IP Families
ipFamilies.description: IP Families for the service (IPv4, IPv6, or both)

ipFamilyPolicy.title: IP Family Policy
ipFamilyPolicy.description: IP Family Policy for the service

ollama.title: Ollama configuration
ollama.description: Ollama configuration. All settings are configured via environment variables (Ollama uses env vars, not CLI arguments).

port.title: Server port
port.description: Server port (default: 11434). OLLAMA_HOST is automatically set to 0.0.0.0:<port> for Kubernetes.

debug.title: Debug mode
debug.description: OLLAMA_DEBUG - Show additional debug information. Set to '1' to enable, leave empty to disable.

contextLength.title: Context length
contextLength.description: OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH - Override default context window size (e.g. 4096, 32768). Use "0" for Ollama no-limit / default-disable semantics. Must be a string (not a JSON number). Leave empty to omit the env var.

ginMode.title: GIN framework mode
ginMode.description: GIN_MODE - GIN framework mode (debug or release). For production, it is recommended to set this to 'release' to reduce log verbosity. Default is 'debug' which shows detailed GIN framework logs.

host.title: Host address
host.description: OLLAMA_HOST - IP Address for the ollama server (default: 127.0.0.1:11434). Leave empty to use default (0.0.0.0:11434 for Kubernetes). Format: '0.0.0.0:11434' or leave empty for auto.

cloud.title: Ollama Cloud
cloud.description: Ollama Cloud outbound configuration. Supports direct API key injection and explicit local-only mode.

disable.title: Disable Ollama Cloud
disable.description: Set OLLAMA_NO_CLOUD=1 to force local-only mode and disable cloud features.

apiKey.title: Cloud API key (direct)
apiKey.description: OLLAMA_API_KEY direct value (not recommended for production). Prefer apiKeySecret.

name.title: Secret name
name.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing the API key.

key.title: Secret key
key.description: Key inside the Secret containing the API key value.

keepAlive.title: Keep alive duration
keepAlive.description: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE - The duration that models stay loaded in memory (default: '5m'). Examples: '5m', '10m', '1h'.

maxLoadedModels.title: Max loaded models
maxLoadedModels.description: OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS - Maximum number of loaded models per GPU. Leave null to use default.

maxQueue.title: Max queue
maxQueue.description: OLLAMA_MAX_QUEUE - Maximum number of queued requests. Leave null to use default.

numParallel.title: Number of parallel requests
numParallel.description: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL - Maximum number of parallel requests. Leave null to use default.

noPrune.title: No prune
noPrune.description: OLLAMA_NOPRUNE - Do not prune model blobs on startup. Set to true to disable pruning.

origins.title: Allowed origins
origins.description: OLLAMA_ORIGINS - A comma separated list of allowed origins. Example: 'https://example.com,https://another.com' or '*' for all.

schedSpread.title: Schedule spread
schedSpread.description: OLLAMA_SCHED_SPREAD - Always schedule model across all GPUs. Set to true to enable.

flashAttention.title: Flash attention
flashAttention.description: OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION - Enable flash attention. Set to true to enable.

kvCacheType.title: KV cache type
kvCacheType.description: OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE - Quantization type for the K/V cache (default: f16). Options: f16, q8_0, q4_0, etc. Leave empty for default.

llmLibrary.title: LLM library
llmLibrary.description: OLLAMA_LLM_LIBRARY - Set LLM library to bypass autodetection. Example: 'cuda', 'rocm', 'metal', 'cpu'.

gpuOverhead.title: GPU overhead
gpuOverhead.description: OLLAMA_GPU_OVERHEAD - Reserve a portion of VRAM per GPU (bytes). Leave null to use default.

loadTimeout.title: Load timeout
loadTimeout.description: OLLAMA_LOAD_TIMEOUT - How long to allow model loads to stall before giving up (default: '5m'). Examples: '5m', '10m', '1h'.

modelsPath.title: Models path
modelsPath.description: OLLAMA_MODELS - The path to the models directory. Automatically set to /models when persistence.enabled=true. Leave empty to use default.

enabled.title: Enable GPU
enabled.description: Set to true to force GPU mode, false to disable (default: false, uses auto-detection)

startupDiagnostics.title: Startup diagnostics
startupDiagnostics.description: Show diagnostic information at container startup. Useful for troubleshooting deployment issues.

enabled.title: Enable startup diagnostics
enabled.description: Show diagnostic information at container startup

showServerLogs.title: Show server logs
showServerLogs.description: OLLAMA_SHOW_SERVER_LOGS - Enable display of server logs in container log output. When enabled, Ollama server logs are displayed in the container log output.

sshKey.title: SSH key configuration
sshKey.description: SSH key configuration for private HuggingFace models. Ollama uses SSH keys (not HF_TOKEN) for authenticating with private HuggingFace repositories. Both HF_TOKEN and SSH keys can be used together (HF_TOKEN for rate limits, SSH for private models).

enabled.title: Enable SSH key
enabled.description: Enable SSH key support for private HuggingFace models

secretName.title: Secret name
secretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes secret containing SSH private key

key.title: Secret key
key.description: Key name in the secret for the SSH private key (default: 'id_rsa')

keyMode.title: Key file permissions
keyMode.description: SSH key file permissions (default: '0600' for private keys)

hfToken.title: HuggingFace token
hfToken.description: HuggingFace token configuration for pulling models from HuggingFace Hub. Required for rate limit avoidance. Note: Private models require SSH keys, not HF_TOKEN.

credentials.title: Credentials from secret
credentials.description: Use credentials from Kubernetes secret (RECOMMENDED for production)

secretName.title: Secret name
secretName.description: Name of the secret containing HF_TOKEN

token.title: Direct token
token.description: Direct HF token value (NOT RECOMMENDED for production - use secret instead)

insecure.title: Insecure pull
insecure.description: Add insecure flag for pulling models at container startup. Allows pulling from insecure registries (not recommended for production).

mountPath.title: Mount path override
mountPath.description: Override ollama-data volume mount path. Default: '/models' (when persistence.enabled=true) or '/root/.ollama' (when persistence.enabled=false). Leave empty to use default.

models.title: Models management
models.description: Models management - automatic model pulling and cache synchronization. Models in the pull list are automatically pulled if missing, and models NOT in the list are automatically removed from cache. Useful for GitOps deployments where you want models ready before serving traffic.

autoPull.title: Auto-pull (entrypoint)
autoPull.description: Controls whether the chart sets OLLAMA_AUTO_PULL_MODELS for the container entrypoint script.

pull.title: Models to pull
pull.description: List of models to pull at container startup. Models in this list are pulled if missing, and models NOT in this list are automatically removed from cache. The more you add, the longer the container will take to start if models are not present.

derivedModels.title: Derived models
derivedModels.description: GitOps-defined models built from a base (FROM) with Modelfile PARAMETER lines. Applied only by the Ollama image entrypoint via mounted derived-models.json and OLLAMA_DERIVED_MODELS_* (see ENTRYPOINT_DERIVED_MODELS_SPEC.md). Rendered values are authoritative. Helm appends -<Release.Namespace> to each logical name. Only rows whose `from` string equals an entry in models.pull are emitted to the manifest and retain JSON.

name.title: Derived model name
name.description: Logical Ollama model name in values; rendered manifest uses this plus -<Release.Namespace> (model:tag → model:tag-<ns>, else name-<ns>) when `from` is listed in models.pull.

create.title: Models to create
create.description: List of models to create at container startup. Can create from ConfigMaps or inline templates.

clean.title: Clean unused models
clean.description: NOTE: This property is deprecated. Cache cleanup is handled by the entrypoint script. Models NOT in the pull: list are automatically removed from cache on container startup. This property is kept for backward compatibility but is no longer used.

additionalArgs.title: Additional arguments
additionalArgs.description: Additional Ollama command line arguments (Ollama uses 'ollama serve' command with minimal CLI args).

env.title: Environment variables
env.description: Additional environment variables for the Ollama container. Each environment variable must specify either 'value' OR 'valueFrom', but NOT both.

value.title: Variable value
value.description: Direct value for the environment variable. Mutually exclusive with valueFrom. Set to null or omit if using valueFrom.

valueFrom.title: Value from source
valueFrom.description: Value from a secret, configMap, or other source. Mutually exclusive with value. Set to null or omit if using value.

divisor.title: Divisor
divisor.description: Divisor to normalize the resource value

gpuResourceType.title: GPU resource type
gpuResourceType.description: GPU resource type - can be 'nvidia.com/gpu' (default) or 'gpu'. Set to 'gpu' for generic GPU resources, or 'nvidia.com/gpu' for NVIDIA-specific.

gpu.title: GPU limit (generic)
gpu.description: GPU resource limit using 'gpu' key. Will be mapped to gpuResourceType. Example: '0' for no GPU, '1' for one GPU, '2' for two GPUs.

nvidia.com/gpu.title: GPU limit (NVIDIA)
nvidia.com/gpu.description: GPU resource limit using 'nvidia.com/gpu' key directly. Example: '0' for no GPU, '1' for one GPU, '2' for two GPUs.

gpu.title: GPU request (generic)
gpu.description: GPU resource request using 'gpu' key. Will be mapped to gpuResourceType. Example: '0' for no GPU, '1' for one GPU, '2' for two GPUs.

nvidia.com/gpu.title: GPU request (NVIDIA)
nvidia.com/gpu.description: GPU resource request using 'nvidia.com/gpu' key directly. Example: '0' for no GPU, '1' for one GPU, '2' for two GPUs.

existingClaim.title: Existing PVC name
existingClaim.description: If set, uses an existing PVC instead of creating a new one. Useful when you have a pre-created PVC with model data.

name.title: PVC name
name.description: Name of the persistent volume claim (only used when existingClaim is empty). If empty, defaults to {release-name}-models

size.title: Storage size
size.description: Storage size (only used when creating a new PVC, existingClaim is empty)

storageClass.title: Storage class
storageClass.description: Storage class for persistent volume (only used when creating a new PVC, existingClaim is empty)

initContainers.title: Init containers
initContainers.description: Init containers to run before the main container

extraVolumeMounts.title: Extra volume mounts
extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the main container

readOnlyRootFilesystem.title: Read-only root filesystem
readOnlyRootFilesystem.description: Enable read-only root filesystem for security

runtimeClassName.title: Runtime class name
runtimeClassName.description: Runtime class name for container runtime (e.g., 'nvidia' for NVIDIA Container Runtime). Required for GPU workloads to access CUDA libraries.

networkPolicy.title: Network Policy configuration
networkPolicy.description: Restricts pod-to-pod communication within the cluster while allowing internet access. Configure ingress.from to limit which namespaces/pods can reach Ollama.

enabled.title: Enable network policy
enabled.description: Enable NetworkPolicy to restrict cluster-internal communication (enabled by default for security)

from.title: Ingress sources
from.description: Optional: restrict ingress using namespaceSelector or podSelector. If empty, allows all namespaces.

allowDNS.title: Allow DNS
allowDNS.description: Allow DNS resolution (required for external connections)

allowedPorts.title: Allowed ports
allowedPorts.description: Allowed outbound ports (defaults to 80, 443, 8080, 8443 if empty)

additionalRules.title: Additional egress rules
additionalRules.description: Additional egress rules for specific IPs or services

auth.title: API authentication
auth.description: API request authentication middleware. PREFERRED: Use valueFromSecret (RECOMMENDED for production). ALTERNATIVE: Use value for direct value (NOT RECOMMENDED for production).

keys.title: API keys
keys.description: List of API keys for authentication. PREFERRED: Use valueFromSecret (RECOMMENDED). ALTERNATIVE: Use value for direct value (NOT RECOMMENDED for production).

name.title: Key name
name.description: Environment variable name for the API key (e.g., OLLAMA_API_KEY)

value.title: Key value (direct)
value.description: Direct API key value (NOT RECOMMENDED for production - use valueFromSecret instead)

valueFromSecret.title: Key from secret
valueFromSecret.description: Reference to Kubernetes secret (RECOMMENDED for production). Format: secret-name:key-name

valueFromEnv.title: Key from environment
valueFromEnv.description: Reference to existing environment variable name
